query:
_index=sec_signal 
 {{{keywords}}}
 
| where !(isempty(suppressedreasons))
| if (isempty(suppressedReasons),"NO","YES") as suppressed
| where suppressed = "YES"
| if (suppressed="YES",1,0) as is_suppressed
| if(suppressed="NO",1,0) as is_generated
| sum(is_suppressed) as suppressed by ruleName | sort by suppressed

sources.dashboardDescription: This dashboard shows an overview and some detailed tabular views for reflected CSE Signal events, specifically mapping, parsers and suppression.
sources.panelTitle: Rule Signal Counts  Showing Suppression Count
